instruction: Review your grades in CS101. Independently compute your weighted score from individual assignment scores, category weights, and drop-lowest policies. If you find a discrepancy of more than 1 point between your computation and the displayed score, resubmit the most impactful graded assignment (the one in the highest-weighted category) with file 'grade_verification.pdf'. If there is no discrepancy (within 1 point), mark the course's latest announcement as read.
